backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the PEB-Sim backend, defining types (Project, User, SharedLink, Comment) and implementing shared links, comments, project management, user profiles, and Stripe integration with role-based access control and blob storage mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms the old actor state to the new state shape by adding empty sharedLinks and comments maps with their respective ID counters.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented features (GA Drawing Generator, LOD 350 connection hotspots, etc.) with associated source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to short descriptions summarizing each file's role, components, and key hooks used in the application.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, sidebar, chart colors, etc.).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the PEB-Sim React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (login, dashboard, project viewer, pricing, payment, share view), wraps the app in QueryClientProvider and ThemeProvider, and registers the router type.
frontend/src/components/AccessoryControl: UI card component for toggling building accessories (ventilators, gutters, doors, X-bracing) and selecting which bays are braced via checkboxes.
frontend/src/components/AdvancedExportBu: Renders two buttons that export the current building state as STAAD.Pro (.std) and IFC (.ifc) files, with loading states and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/AnnotationMarker: Renders billboard-style 3D annotation markers in a Three.js scene for a list of comments, always facing the camera and triggering a click callback.
frontend/src/components/BrandingControls: A UI card component for configuring building branding options including signage text visibility and RAL color pickers for roof, wall, trim, and structure.
Renders a single structural building element as a 3D cylinder mesh with type-based color/radius, supporting a bounce fly-in animation on appearance.
Renders centered 3D extruded text signage on the building using React Three Fiber's Text3D component, conditionally shown based on visibility and text content.
frontend/src/components/BuildingSimulato: The main 3D building simulator component that composes a Three.js Canvas scene with structural members, cladding, accessories, environment, annotations, and walkthrough controls based on provided building parameters and state.
frontend/src/components/CladdingControls: A UI card component with toggles and radio buttons for controlling roof/wall cladding visibility, skylight mode, secondary members, and cladding profile type.
frontend/src/components/CladdingSystem.t: Renders the building's roof and wall cladding as textured or semi-transparent plane meshes in Three.js, supporting trapezoidal and standing seam profiles with configurable colors and skylight mode.
frontend/src/components/ClearanceCheckBo: A draggable 3D box component rendered in a Three.js scene that represents a vehicle (Truck or Forklift) and detects collisions with structural bounds, changing color from green to red on collision.
frontend/src/components/ClearanceCheckCo: A UI card component with a toggle switch and radio group to enable/disable the clearance check feature and select a vehicle preset, displaying its dimensions and usage instructions.
frontend/src/components/CommentInputPopo: A fixed-position popover form for adding text annotations to a building element, with submit/cancel actions and Ctrl+Enter keyboard shortcut support.
frontend/src/components/CommentSidebar.t: A collapsible sidebar panel that lists all annotations/comments for a project, supporting deletion by the comment owner and click-to-highlight navigation.
frontend/src/components/ConnectionDetail: A dialog modal that renders detailed SVG engineering diagrams (base plate, haunch, etc.) for structural connection types selected in the 3D viewer.
frontend/src/components/ConnectionHotspo: Renders animated pulsing 3D sphere hotspots at key structural connection points (base plates, haunches, ridge) on a building frame, triggering a callback on click.
frontend/src/components/CreateProjectFor: A dialog form for creating a new project by entering a name and uploading a DXF file or using a sample building, handling parsing, status updates, and error reporting.
frontend/src/components/DoorsAndShutters: Renders 3D door and shutter meshes on specified building wall sides using React Three Fiber, positioning each element based on normalized wall position and building dimensions.
frontend/src/components/EngineeringInput: A form card component for inputting structural load parameters including wind speed, seismic zone, and live load, with controlled inputs bound to a LoadInputs state object.
frontend/src/components/EngineeringPanel: Displays a calculated engineering summary (steel weight, sheeting area, design status, notes) and provides a button to download a Bill of Quantities CSV based on current building configuration.
frontend/src/components/EnvironmentContr: A UI card with a radio group allowing the user to select the ground surface texture type (Concrete, Asphalt, or Grass) for the 3D scene.
frontend/src/components/EnvironmentScene: Renders a 3D environment with a textured ground plane and a dynamic sky whose sun position is calculated from a time-of-day value using React Three Fiber and Drei.
frontend/src/components/FoundationGeomet: Renders 3D foundation geometry (concrete pedestal, foundation block, and grout layer) at each column base position calculated from building span, length, and bay spacing.
frontend/src/components/GADrawingsExport: A button component that generates four GA drawing SVGs (anchor bolt plan, cross section, roof plan, side elevation) and exports them as a PDF using jsPDF.
frontend/src/components/GuttersAndDownsp: Renders 3D gutter meshes along all four eaves and evenly spaced cylindrical downspouts on both sides of the building using React Three Fiber.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout component providing a sticky navigation header with logo, nav links, user profile display, and logout functionality, with redirect logic for unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that collects a display name and optional email to set up a new user profile, submitting via the `useSaveCallerUserProfile` mutation with toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/ProjectLimitWarn: Displays a warning banner when a user has reached the 2-project free tier limit, with an upgrade button that navigates to the pricing page.
frontend/src/components/ProjectList.tsx: Renders a list of projects with status badges, metadata, view/delete actions, and an empty state; uses `useDeleteProject` for deletion with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/RALColorPicker.t: A popover-based color picker that displays a grid of RAL standard colors, allowing the user to select one and showing the current selection with a checkmark.
frontend/src/components/RateCardPanel.ts: A form panel with numeric inputs for configuring cost rates (primary steel, secondary steel, sheeting, erection labor) used in project cost calculations.
frontend/src/components/SecondaryMembers: A Three.js React component that renders instanced Z-purlins and C-girts on a PEB structure's roof slopes and walls based on building dimensions and bay spacing.
frontend/src/components/ShadowStudy.tsx: A Three.js component that positions a directional light to simulate sun position based on time of day (6–20h), enabling dynamic shadow casting when the shadow study mode is active.
frontend/src/components/ShadowStudyContr: A UI card with a toggle switch and time-of-day slider (06:00–20:00) for controlling the shadow study feature in the 3D viewer.
frontend/src/components/ShareButton.tsx: A button that generates a shareable read-only link for a project via `useCreateSharedLink`, then displays the URL in a dialog with a copy-to-clipboard action.
frontend/src/components/StripeSetupPanel: Admin-only panel that renders a fixed button and dialog form for configuring Stripe payments by submitting a secret key and allowed countries list.
frontend/src/components/SubscriptionBadg: Displays a styled badge indicating a user's subscription tier as either 'PRO' (amber with Zap icon) or 'FREE' (muted with Lock icon).
frontend/src/components/TimelineControls: UI component providing playback controls (play/pause, skip, slider, step markers) for stepping through erection sequence steps.
3D React Three Fiber component rendering an animated spinning turbo ventilator with vanes and a dome that rotates continuously.
frontend/src/components/VideoExportButto: Button component that triggers canvas video recording of the erection animation sequence and downloads the result on completion.
frontend/src/components/ViewModeToggle.t: Toggle button with tooltip that switches between orbit view and first-person building walkthrough mode.
frontend/src/components/WalkthroughContr: First-person walkthrough controller using PointerLockControls and WASD keys with collision clamping to building bounds and Escape to exit.
frontend/src/components/XBracing.tsx: 3D component that renders X-bracing rod pairs on the left and right walls for specified braced bays of a building frame.
frontend/src/data/ralColors.ts: Defines a list of 25 RAL color entries (code, name, hex) and exports default color selections for roof, wall, trim, and structure.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useDxfParser.ts: Custom hook that manages DXF file parsing state, validating file type/size, parsing entities, and exposing elements, loading, error, and reset state.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state and persisting identity via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profiles, authentication, and project CRUD operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useVideoExport.ts: Custom hook that captures a canvas element as a WebM video using MediaRecorder and triggers a download when recording stops.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining an industrial dark theme with amber accents using Tailwind CSS, custom CSS variables, and IBM Plex fonts.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard page displaying the user's projects list with stats, subscription tier badge, project limit warnings, and a create project form.
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: Login page with a blueprint-themed hero layout that triggers Internet Identity authentication and redirects authenticated users to the dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailure.tsx: Displays a payment cancellation/failure page with an explanation of possible causes and buttons to retry checkout or return to the dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccess.tsx: Displays a payment success page that verifies the Stripe session status and shows unlocked Pro features with a link back to the dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/Pricing.tsx: Renders a two-tier pricing page (Free vs Pro at $29/month), showing feature lists and handling Stripe checkout session creation for upgrades.
frontend/src/pages/ProjectViewer.tsx: Full-featured project viewer page combining a 3D BuildingSimulator with tabbed controls for cladding, accessories, branding, engineering, and cost, plus sharing and comment functionality.
frontend/src/pages/ShareView.tsx: Read-only shared project view that loads a project by share token, renders the 3D BuildingSimulator with default states, and displays a comment sidebar.
frontend/src/utils/calculateBuildingStat: Calculates building statistics (steel weight, sheeting area, roof/wall areas, design status) from dimensions, member sizes, openings, and load inputs using IS 800/MBMA heuristics.
Computes a commercial cost breakdown (primary steel, secondary steel, sheeting, erection labor) from a rate card and building stats, with currency formatting utilities.
frontend/src/utils/dxfParser.ts: Parses ASCII DXF files client-side to extract LINE and LWPOLYLINE entities from PEB-relevant layers, mapping them to BuildingElement objects with erection order and 3D coordinates.
frontend/src/utils/gaDrawingGenerator.ts: Generates SVG-based General Arrangement drawing views (anchor bolt plan, elevations, etc.) from a BuildingState object, including dimension lines and title blocks.
frontend/src/utils/generateBOQ.ts: Generates a Bill of Quantities item list for a PEB structure by calculating member counts, weights, and cladding areas from building dimensions, member sizes, and opening data.
frontend/src/utils/ifcExporter.ts: Exports PEB structural members to an IFC 2x3 formatted file, building columns and beams as IFCCOLUMN/IFCBEAM entities with axis placements derived from building state parameters.
frontend/src/utils/staadExporter.ts: Generates a STAAD.Pro .std input file from building geometry, including joint coordinates, member incidences, material properties, supports, and a basic dead load case.
frontend/src/utils/svgToPdf.ts: Converts an array of SVG drawing pages to a downloadable multi-page HTML file by rendering each SVG to a canvas and embedding the resulting PNG data URLs.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom fonts (IBM Plex), extended color tokens (charcoal, steel, amber, semantic UI colors using OKLCH), and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest for PEB-Sim (a 3D Pre-Engineered Building tool) at version 3, documenting existing features, planned Phase 3 additions (GA drawings, LOD 350 details, collaborative sharing, costing engine, BIM export), and architectural notes.
